name: ALTAMIRA BY VTP LUXE
seoTitle: ALTAMIRA BY VTP LUXE in Kharadi, Pune | VTP BLUEWATERS Ultra Luxury
seoDescription: Discover ALTAMIRA BY VTP LUXE, an ultra-luxury residential masterpiece by VTP Realty located in Kharadi, Pune. Explore 2, 3 & 4 BHK premium configurations.
overview: ALTAMIRA BY VTP LUXE sets a new global benchmark for luxury living in Kharadi, Pune. Designed strictly on the Maximum Livable Area (MLA) philosophy, every residence ensures zero space wastage, soaring ceilings, and panoramic views. Nestled within Township Pegasus, this architectural marvel seamlessly connects the tranquility of nature with the high-paced lifestyle of Kharadi, Pune. Experience world-class amenities, robust multi-tier security, and a community of like-minded elites.

specifications.details: Imported Marble in Living/Dining; Premium Wooden Laminate in Master Bedroom; Anti-skid Vitrified Tiles in Balconies.
Engineered Quartz Countertop, SS Sink with Drainboard, Provision for Water Purifier and Exhaust Fan.
Grohe/Kohler Premium CP Fittings, Glass Partition in Master Bath, Designer Dado Tiles up to lintel level.
Video Door Phone, 5-Tier Security System, Digital Lock for Main Door, CCTV in Common Areas.
